untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'sound base-building period' (5-10 days post-breakout) and 'prior price base' reference level, which cannot be directly expressed with the allowed indicators. These require pattern recognition of historical price consolidation zones and breakout events that are not available in the indicator set. RSI >= 80 and price_pos_20 <= 0.05 approximate the high relative strength and early extension criteria, but the base-building emergence window cannot be accurately translated.
translation_notes: Used rsi_14 >= 80 as proxy for 'high relative strength'. Used price_pos_20 (position within 20-day high-low range) <= 0.05 to approximate 'not yet extended more than 5% beyond base'. Stop loss set to 5% representing base support level. Hold days capped at 10 days per base emergence window. Missing: explicit base-building period detection (requires pattern recognition of consolidation).
